name: Insurance Australia Group Limited
analysis: IAG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$8.0100, stop A$7.3606, target A$9.9581 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
